name: Graphite
pricing_notes: Free for solo; Team $19/user/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: GitHub OAuth; Graphite CLI authenticates with GitHub via token

performance.notes: CLI tool + web dashboard; PR operations via GitHub API

agent_readiness.notes: Stacked PRs / trunk-based development tool. CLI for creating and managing dependent PR stacks. Merge queue. Code review dashboard. Git workflow optimizer for teams shipping multiple changes in parallel.

gotchas: CLI-centric — limited REST API for external automation
Stacked PR workflow requires team adoption to be effective
Learning curve for teams unfamiliar with stacked PR patterns
best_when: Teams practicing trunk-based development with stacked PRs
High-velocity teams shipping many parallel changes
Teams wanting merge queues and batch CI
Developer productivity improvement for GitHub-based teams
avoid_when: Teams with simple PR workflows that don't need stacking
Low-PR-volume teams where overhead isn't justified
summary: Graphite is a developer productivity tool for stacked PRs and trunk-based development on GitHub. CLI manages dependent PR stacks, syncs them when bases change, and provides a code review dashboard. Merge queue support for batch CI optimization. Best for high-velocity GitHub teams shipping multiple parallel changes daily.
